title: Check if you need a visa or eTA to travel to Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Check if you need a visa or eTA to travel to Canada
Everyone needs the right documents to travel to or transit through Canada: an electronic travel authorization (eTA), a visitor visa, or just a passport.
To be able to access all our features, you need a browser that supports JavaScript, and it needs to be enabled.
For more information about entry requirements, read: Entry requirements by country or territory
Your result is loading...

## Give us feedback about our new tool
Answer a few short questions about your experience with this tool. It will only take 5 minutes to share your feedback.
This tool was created to help you identify the entry document you may need to travel to Canada. This tool may not provide information on all entry documents or your particular situation. If you choose to apply, we will assess your application in accordance with the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act and its related Regulations.
Read our complete terms and conditions Opens in a new tab .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
